name.description: Gets or sets the name of the status.

number.description:
Gets or sets the number of the status.

The number is a human readable identifier of the status.

roles.description:
Gets or sets the roles.

The roles will decide whether contracts with the status can be manipulated in certain ways.
A list of available roles at the moment:
<list type="bullet"><item>disable_edit</item>
Will diable editing of the cotracts.<item>disable_delete</item>
The user should be unable to delete the contract if a status with this role is set.<item>update_instance_data</item>
If a status is set with this role the instance data, e.g. contact information will be automatically
updated when updated in a contact.</list>

loadStart.description:
Gets or sets the load time slot start with date and time

This will define the start of the time range the driver could start the loading process.
This will usually be set by the user or an api based on the values he gets from customer.

loadEnd.description:
Gets or sets the load time slot end with date and time.

This will define the end of the time range the driver could end the loading process.
This will usually be set by the user or an api based on the values he gets from the customer.

plannedLoadStart.description:
Gets or sets the planned laod start with date and time.

This will define the planned start of the loading process.
This will usually be set by the user based on his dayplan for the resource.

plannedLoadEnd.description:
Gets or sets the planned load end with date and time.

This will define the planned end of the loading process.
This will usually be set by the user based on his dayplan for the resource.

calculatedLoadStart.description:
Gets or sets the calculated load start with date and time.

This will define the calculated / theoretical start of the loading process.
This will usually be set by an api based on data given by the telematics.

calculatedLoadEnd.description:
Gets or sets the calculated load end with date and time.

This will define the calculated / theoretical end of the laoding process.
This will usually be set by an api based on data given by the telematics.

actualLoadStart.description:
Gets or sets the actual laod start with date and time.

This will define the actual start of the loading process.
This will usually be set by an api based on the data given by the telematics.

actualLoadEnd.description:
Gets or sets the actual load end with date and time.

This will define the actual end of the loading process.
This will usually be set by an api based on the data given by the telematics

deliveryStart.description:
Gets or sets the delivery time slot start with date and time.

This will define the start of the time range when the driver could deliver the shipment.
This will usually be set by the user or an api based on the values he gets from the customer.

deliveryEnd.description:
Gets or sets the delivery time slot end with date and time.

This will define the end of the time range when the driver could deliver the shipment.
This will usually be set by the user or an api based on the values he gets from the customer.

plannedDeliveryStart.description:
Gets or sets the planned delivery start with date and time.

This defines the planned start of the delivery / unloading process.
This will usually be set by the user based on his dayplan of the resource.

plannedDeliveryEnd.description:
Gets or sets the planned delivery end with date and time.

This defines the planned end off the delivery / unlaoding process.
This will usually be set by the user based on his dayplan of the resource.

calculatedDeliveryStart.description:
Gets or sets the calculated delivery start with date and time.

This defines the calculated start of the delivery / unlaoding process.
This will usually be set by an api based on telematics data.

calculatedDeliveryEnd.description:
Gets or sets the calculated delivery end with date and time.

This defines the calculated end of the delivery / unlaoding process.
This will usually be set by an api based on telematics data.

actualDeliveryStart.description:
Gets or sets the actual delivery start with date and time.

This defines the actual start of the delivery / unlaoding process.
This will usually be set by an api based on telematics data.

actualDeliveryEnd.description:
Gets or sets the actual delivery end with date and time.

This defines the actual end of the delivery / unlaoding process.
This will usually be set by an api based on telematics data.

orderDate.description:
Gets or sets the order date.

This defines the date the shipment is ordered at.
This is a relevant information for the billing process and needs to be set.

shipmentNumber.description:
Gets or sets the shipment number.

This defines a number to identify the shipment as the user.

referenceNumber.description:
Gets or sets the reference number

This defines a number that references the same shipment in another programm or context.

loadNumber.description:
Gets or sets the load number.

This defines a number that the driver might need to load this shipment

deliveryNumber.description:
Gets or sets the delivery number.

This defines a number that the driber might need to deliver / unload this shipment.

isTemplate.description:
Gets or sets werther the shipment is a template.

Template shipments are used to create shipments with certain values preset.

templateName.description:
Gets or sets the template name.

A name for the template to give the user the option to find it easier

tags.description:
Gets or sets the tags.

Tags are short texts to add information to a shipment without the need to add new properties.
These are e.g. used in the pricing module to add some additional conditions.

notes.description:
Gets or sets the notes.

This gives the user the possibillity to add some more sentences about this shipment.

loadWorkflowId.description:
Gets or sets the load workflow.

Represents a telematic workflow that can be set to give the driver 
additional instructions during the loading process.
Usually these workflows need to be enabled and added within their telematic system.

deliveryWorkflowId.description:
Gets or sets the delivery workflow.

Represents a telematic workflow that can be set to give the driver 
additional instructions during the delivery / unload process.
Usually these workflows need to be enabled and added within their telematic system.

constructionSiteId.description:
Gets or sets a construction site id.

The id will be resolved by the construction site api.

departmentId.description: Gets or sets the department id.

addon.description:
Gets or sets a dictionary of addon properties.

Can be used to set customer exclusive properties for a contract.

items.description:
Gets or sets shipment items.

Represents a list of items of a shipment which will contain further information about the freight.

billingLines.description: Gets or sets the list of billing lines.

id.description: Gets the id of the terms of payment.

number.description:
Gets the number.

The number is a human readable identifier.

Bearer.description:
JWT Authorization header using the Bearer scheme. 

 Enter 'Bearer' [space] and then your token in the text input below.

Example: "Bearer 12345abcdef"
